name: metro-railgun-node-host
description: Embedded Node host that runs the RAILGUN engine + Groth16 native prover inside nodejs-mobile-react-native. Bundled into the native binary at build time; EXCLUDED from the Metro bundle (see apps/app/metro.config.js resolver.blockList). Versions mirror RAILGUN Railway-Wallet's known-good mobile/nodejs-src/nodejs-project set.
